mapper.sql: p.latitude BETWEEN #{lat} - (#{radius} / 111320.0) AND #{lat} + (#{radius} / 111320.0) AND p.longitude BETWEEN #{lng} - (#{radius} / (111320.0 * GREATEST(ABS(COS(RADIANS(#{lat}))), 0.000001))) AND #{lng} + (#{radius} / (111320.0 * GREATEST(ABS(COS(RADIANS(#{lat}))), 0.000001)))
6371000 * 2 * ASIN( SQRT( POWER(SIN(RADIANS((p.latitude - #{lat}) / 2)), 2) + COS(RADIANS(#{lat})) * COS(RADIANS(p.latitude)) * POWER(SIN(RADIANS((p.longitude - #{lng}) / 2)), 2) ) )
p.latitude IS NOT NULL AND p.longitude IS NOT NULL AND AND <= #{radius}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, COALESCE(NULLIF(p.property_name, ''), NULLIF(p.road_name, ''), NULLIF(p.lot_number, ''), '이름 없음') AS property_name, rsm.safety_score, rsm.safety_grade, p.property_type AS rent_type, CASE WHEN p.min_trade_amount IS NOT NULL AND (p.min_deposit_amount IS NOT NULL OR p.min_monthly_rent_amount IS NOT NULL) THEN 'MIXED' WHEN p.min_trade_amount IS NOT NULL THEN 'SALE' WHEN COALESCE(p.max_monthly_rent_amount, 0) > 0 THEN 'MONTHLY_RENT' WHEN p.min_deposit_amount IS NOT NULL THEN 'JEONSE' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS transaction_type, p.min_deposit_amount, p.max_deposit_amount, p.min_monthly_rent_amount, p.max_monthly_rent_amount, p.min_trade_amount, p.max_trade_amount, TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', NULLIF(p.region_name, ''), COALESCE(NULLIF(p.road_name, ''), NULLIF(p.lot_number, '')) )) AS address, p.latitude, p.longitude FROM properties p LEFT JOIN region_safety_masters rsm ON rsm.region_code = p.region_code WHERE ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM properties p WHERE
